title: 3D Digital Twin
description: Rotate the plant, run the sun path, compute shading, inspect equipment and export the scene.

steps.title: The 3D viewport
steps.description: Drag to orbit, scroll to zoom, click any object to inspect it.
steps.voiceScript: This is your plant in three dimensions. Drag to orbit and scroll to zoom.
steps.captionText: This is your plant in three dimensions. Drag to orbit and scroll to zoom.
steps.fallbackMessage: The 3D viewport: not visible on this page yet.

steps.title: Design parameters
steps.description: Change tilt, azimuth or row spacing and re-run the simulation.
steps.voiceScript: Change the tilt, azimuth or row spacing on the left.
steps.captionText: Change the tilt, azimuth or row spacing on the left.
steps.fallbackMessage: Design parameters: not visible on this page yet.

steps.title: Run the simulation
steps.description: The server recomputes shading, yield and the BOQ.
steps.voiceScript: Run the simulation. The server recomputes shading, yield and the bill of quantities.
steps.captionText: Run the simulation. The server recomputes shading, yield and the bill of quantities.
steps.fallbackMessage: Run the simulation: not visible on this page yet.

steps.title: Sun path and shading
steps.description: Scrub month and hour to see shadows move across the array.
steps.voiceScript: Scrub the month and hour sliders to watch shadows move across the array.
steps.captionText: Scrub the month and hour sliders to watch shadows move across the array.
steps.fallbackMessage: Sun path and shading: not visible on this page yet.

steps.title: Inspect equipment
steps.description: Click a transformer or inverter for its specification and BOQ link.
steps.voiceScript: Click any transformer or inverter to inspect its specification.
steps.captionText: Click any transformer or inverter to inspect its specification.
steps.fallbackMessage: Inspect equipment: not visible on this page yet.

steps.title: Camera presets
steps.description: Aerial, ground, inverter, substation and night views.
steps.voiceScript: The virtual reality cards fly the camera to a preset viewpoint.
steps.captionText: The virtual reality cards fly the camera to a preset viewpoint.
steps.fallbackMessage: Camera presets: not visible on this page yet.

steps.title: Export
steps.description: Export a PNG, the scene JSON, the object schedule or a shadow report.
steps.voiceScript: Export an investor image, the scene, or the shadow report.
steps.captionText: Export an investor image, the scene, or the shadow report.
steps.fallbackMessage: Export: not visible on this page yet.
